task: Place the white and black vegetable to the top right corner of the orange cloth.
raw:

  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, white_black_vegetable, <, 0.03) [completion]

  affordance_region: the body of the white black vegetable

Step 3: transport(white_black_vegetable -> orange_cloth)
  affordance_region: the top right corner of the orange cloth

Step 4: place(white_black_vegetable -> orange_cloth)
  affordance_region: the top right corner of the orange cloth
  contact: surface_contact(white_black_vegetable, orange_cloth) [completion]; released(white_black_vegetable) [completion]

  done_when: surface_contact(white_black_vegetable, orange_cloth) AND released(white_black_vegetable) AND stable(white_black_vegetable)
<END_OF_PLAN>
